UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's public profile within the A.snap application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

username.description: A unique, user-chosen handle for identification.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the user.

followingIds.description: An array of UserProfile IDs that this user is following.

followerIds.description: An array of UserProfile IDs that are following this user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

Video.title: Video
Video.description: Represents a short video post uploaded by a user.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who uploaded this video.

videoUrl.description: URL of the video content, hosted externally (e.g., Cloudinary).

thumbnailUrl.description: URL of a thumbnail image for the video.

caption.description: Text caption provided by the user for the video.

likeCount.description: The total number of likes this video has received.

commentCount.description: The total number of comments this video has received.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the video was posted.

Like.title: Like
Like.description: Represents a user's 'like' on a specific video.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who performed the like.

videoId.description: Reference to the Video that was liked.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the like was recorded.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a text comment made by a user on a specific video.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who posted the comment.

videoId.description: Reference to the Video that the comment is on.

text.description: The actual text content of the comment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was posted.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. The document ID (`userId`) must match the Firebase Authentication UID.
A top-level collection for all public video posts.
Subcollection for user likes on a specific video.
Subcollection for user comments on a specific video.
